site.tagline: Transforming Business Through Data & Artificial Intelligence
site.about:
We are the Data & AI team at Noventiq Egypt — a group of data scientists and AI engineers passionate about building intelligent, data-driven solutions. We specialize in machine learning, deep learning, LLMs, multi-agent systems, and enterprise data engineering.

Our mission is to help businesses unlock the full potential of their data through cutting-edge AI technologies and actionable insights.

services.title: Machine Learning Solutions
services.description: Designing and building predictive models for classification, regression, and clustering using Python and Scikit-learn to support business decision-making.

services.title: LLMs & RAG Systems
services.description: Implementing advanced AI chat systems using Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Fine-Tuning for smart question answering.

services.title: Multi-Agent AI Systems
services.description: Developing intelligent multi-agent systems using CrewAI, LangChain, and Python for automation, decision-making, and complex AI workflows.

services.title: Data Engineering & ETL
services.description: Building ETL pipelines using Python, SQL, and SSIS to clean, transform, and organize data for data warehouses and analytics systems.

services.title: Power BI Dashboards
services.description: Creating powerful interactive dashboards using Power BI and DAX to visualize business data and uncover insights.

services.title: Cloud AI Deployment
services.description: Deploying machine learning and AI solutions on Azure and AWS using Docker and Streamlit for scalable production-ready applications.

projects.title: GPT Sofra
projects.description: Multi-agent AI system integrating LLMs and computer vision to generate recipes, analyze food ingredients, and deliver personalized nutrition recommendations in Arabic.
projects.longDescription:
## Overview

GPT Sofra is a multi-agent AI system that integrates LLMs and computer vision...

## Features
- Recipe generation
- Food ingredient analysis
- Nutrition recommendations

## Tech Stack
- Python, LangChain, OpenAI
